name: Poonam Rajak
title: Data Analyst | Data Engineer | Data Science Fresher
summary: Data Science graduate (B.Tech CSE, 2026) seeking entry-level Data Analyst, Data Engineer, or data-focused full-time roles. Skilled in Python, SQL, Power BI, and DAX for data cleaning, EDA, ML modeling, and dashboard delivery. Currently a Data & AI Intern at Graphura India with a portfolio of 6+ projects on GitHub spanning supply chain analytics, NLP, semantic search, and BI dashboards. Certified by Deloitte, Tata, Oracle, AWS, and Salesforce.

experience.title: Data & AI Intern
bullets: Built EDA and preprocessing pipelines in Python on 10,000+ records, reducing manual preprocessing time by ~40%.
Engineered features and tuned ML models, contributing to ~15% improvement in prediction accuracy on assigned use cases.
Automated reporting workflows, reducing stakeholder turnaround time by ~20%.

projects.name: SkillSync Matcher — AI Resume Screening
projects.description: AI-powered resume screening system achieving 85%+ matching accuracy using NLP similarity scoring; reduced manual screening effort by ~70%. Built with Python, Django, NLP, and Scikit-learn.

projects.name: Supply Chain Performance Analysis
projects.description: End-to-end analysis of delivery delays and profitability across supply chain datasets; identified key drivers of delay and margin leakage through statistical analysis using Python, Pandas, and Jupyter.

projects.name: VectorMind Semantic Search
projects.description: Semantic search engine using Sentence Transformers and vector embeddings in MongoDB; deployed interactive Streamlit UI for query-based document retrieval.

projects.name: Weather Intelligence Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time multi-city weather dashboard with automated ETL; created 10+ DAX KPIs and trend analytics reducing refresh time by ~60% using Power BI and REST API.

projects.name: ElectroHub Sales Dashboard
projects.description: Interactive sales and profit dashboard with drill-down insights across categories, regions, and discount patterns using Power BI and DAX.
